mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( o_no ,o_tp, o_date, o_name, o_addr, o_tel, d_name, d_addr, d_tel, m_no, i_no, c_count, c_price ) VALUES ( SEQ_ORDERS.NEXTVAL, #{o_tp}, SYSDATE, #{o_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{o_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{o_tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{d_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{d_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{d_tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{m_no, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{i_no, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{c_count, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{c_price, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
